arts.ttl: Zanetti prepares Verona for crucial clash against Monza
arts.sum: Hellas Verona manager Paolo Zanetti addressed the media ahead of Monday night’s Serie A fixture against Monza. The coach provided insights into his team’s preparation and his perspective on their opponents. Zanetti emphasized the quality of Monza’s squad, stating, “Nesta’s team is built for different objectives. It’s difficult for me to think that such a roster could be involved in a relegation battle. However, we’re only at the beginning, and we’ll be ready on the battlefield.” Regarding potential tactical changes, Zanetti remained flexible: “What formation will we adopt? arts.ttl: Serie A | Verona v Monza: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season enters its eighth round, Hellas Verona prepares to host Monza at the Stadio Marcantonio Bentegodi on Monday evening. This match presents an intriguing contrast between two teams experiencing very different starts to their campaigns. Hellas Verona, currently sitting 12th in the table with 9 points, have shown flashes of potential this season. Their recent 2-1 victory over Venezia ended a concerning three-match losing streak and highlighted their resilience. Manager Paolo Zanetti’s side has been particularly effective in the second half of matches, scoring 9 goals after the break – joint-highest in the league alongside Napoli.
